$comment: English UI chrome for the marketing site. Marketing content (product descriptions, sport features, testimonials, legal docs, FAQ answers) lives in public/data/en/*.json so it can be localised incrementally by content teams.

hero.heading: Run your entire sports academy from one place

cta.heading: Ready to run your academy the modern way?
cta.description: Join the academies already managing athletes, teams, and payments with {name}. Get set up in minutes.

meta.title: Plans and pricing
meta.description: Simple, scalable pricing that grows with your academy. Start free — no credit card required — and only pay when you outgrow the Starter tier.

pricing.heroTitle: Scale your academy, control your costs
pricing.heroDescription: Simple, scalable pricing that grows with your academy. Start free — no credit card required — and only pay when you outgrow the Starter tier.
pricing.landingDescription: Straightforward plans that scale with your academy. No hidden fees.

meta.title: Products
meta.description: The Academorix product line — everything you need to run a modern sports academy, from athlete management to payments and performance.

products.indexTitle: Everything your academy needs, in one platform.
products.indexDescription: Explore each product in depth — every one designed to plug into the same tenant workspace so your team never leaves the platform to get work done.
products.featuresDescription: Every capability listed here is available from the day you provision your workspace — no add-on packages, no per-feature upsells.

meta.title: Sports
meta.description: Football, swimming, basketball, tennis, martial arts, gymnastics — Academorix adapts to every sport with per-discipline attributes, performance metrics, and workflows.

sports.indexTitle: Built for every sport, sport by sport.
sports.indexDescription: One platform, many disciplines. Every sport gets its own attribute sets, performance metrics, and coaching workflows — no half-measures, no forced compromises.
sports.featuresHeading: Built for the way this sport works
sports.featuresDescription: Every capability listed here works out of the box for this sport — no bespoke setup, no professional-services engagement required.

meta.title: Legal
meta.description: Privacy policy, terms of service, security practices, cookie policy, and data processing addendum for the Academorix platform.

legal.indexDescriptionPrefix: Every legal document that governs your use of Academorix. If you can't find what you're looking for, email

meta.title: Enterprise
meta.description: Enterprise-grade security, onboarding, and contracting for multi-branch academies. SSO, audit logs, data residency, and dedicated implementation engineers.

enterprise.indexTitle: Built for the largest sports networks.
enterprise.indexDescription: Multi-branch academies get purpose-built tooling — enterprise SSO, audit logs, data residency, and dedicated implementation engineers to run the migration end-to-end.
enterprise.featuresDescription: What every enterprise engagement includes as standard — no bespoke SOWs, no per-feature bolt-ons.
enterprise.ctaDescription: Every enterprise workspace ships with a named implementation engineer and a dedicated Slack channel.

ctaBand.heading: Ready to run your academy the modern way?
ctaBand.description: Start free — no credit card required. Upgrade when you outgrow the Starter tier.

meta.title: Create a workspace
meta.description: Provision a new academy workspace and its owner account.

createWorkspace.title: Create a workspace
createWorkspace.description: Provision a new academy workspace and its owner account.

errors.policy: Password does not meet the requirements below.
errors.generic: Could not create the workspace. Please try again.

meta.title: Find my workspaces
meta.description: Enter your email and we'll send you the workspaces you belong to.

findWorkspaces.title: Find my workspaces
findWorkspaces.description: Enter the email you used and we'll send you the workspaces you belong to.
findWorkspaces.sentTitle: If any workspaces are linked to that email, we have sent them your way.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you were looking for moved, or maybe it never existed. Try one of the routes below.

meta.title: Blog
meta.description: Product updates, engineering deep-dives, and stories from academies running on Academorix. Coming soon.

blog.title: Stories from the field. Coming soon.
blog.description: Product updates, engineering deep-dives, and stories from real academies running on Academorix. We'll email you when the first posts go live.

meta.title: Documentation
meta.description: How to install, integrate, and operate Academorix — from workspace provisioning to SSO to the Attribute Engine.

docs.title: Every screen, every setting, documented.
docs.description: How to install, integrate, and operate Academorix — from workspace provisioning to SSO to the Attribute Engine. Our full documentation portal opens for public browsing shortly.

meta.title: Changelog
meta.description: Every product release, deprecation, and breaking change — chronologically. Coming soon.

changelog.title: What we shipped, and when.
changelog.description: Every product release, deprecation, and breaking change — chronologically. Subscribe to get an email digest whenever we ship.

meta.title: Customer stories
meta.description: How academies of every size use Academorix to grow — case studies, quotes, and hard numbers.

customers.title: Real academies, real growth.
customers.description: How academies of every size use Academorix to grow — case studies, quotes, and hard numbers. We're finalising the first wave of stories now.
customers.individualDescription: We're finalising the {name} case study now — it'll be live shortly. In the meantime, browse the other stories we've already shared.

meta.title: Newsletter
meta.description: Monthly digest of product updates, industry insights, and stories from the academies we work with.

newsletter.title: One inbox. One month. Everything academy operations.
newsletter.description: A monthly digest of product updates, industry insights, and stories from the academies we work with. Reply to this email to be added to the launch list.
